answer_en:
Orbicularis Oculi m.
Origin: Nasal part of frontal bone, frontal process of maxilla, medial palpebral ligament, and lacrimal crest of lacrimal bone
Insertion: Skin of orbital region, lateral palpebral raphe, superior and inferior tarsal plates
